center.name: Lincoln Park Zoo
center.summary: Lincoln Park Zoo是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Blyth's hornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Wild blyth's Hornbill male passing fruit to mate Blyth's hornbill (Rhyticeros plicatus), also known as the Papuan hornbill, is a large hornbill inhabiting the forest canopy in Wallacea and Melanesia

links.label: 分布于
